name: rukus-bot
description: Rukus all-in-one Discord bot (tickets, forms, moderation) + dashboard

scripts._comment: Railway/Railpack falls back to the root `build` and `start` scripts when a service has no explicit command. `start` runs the BOT (the default service); the DASHBOARD service overrides it via railway.web.json.
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @rukus/db exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter @rukus/web build
